action.reasoning: Observation: Env exploration successful; obs have agent_0_goal_to_agent_gps_compass (dist,angle) and humanoid_detector_sensor. Metrics include nav_seek_success, social_nav_reward. Analysis: We can implement a simple PID-like controller using GPS compass to approach and follow human. This heuristic requires no training and can serve as a strong baseline (literature shows heuristic expert outperforms RL under compute constraints). Decision: Write train.py to run a few episodes, log metrics, and save a dummy checkpoint; write predict.py to load that checkpoint and evaluate 50 episodes using the heuristic controller; submit eval to measure baseline score and iteration time.
action.command: python train.py && python -c "import os; print('heuristic baseline ready')"
